Alright, so the last thing that you're going to want to do before way-in day, before their nutrition orientation is you're going to want to send them a few text messages to keep them hot, to keep them engaged, and to lower the chances that they back out before the challenge begins. So super simple. You are going to be scheduling your nutrition orientation or your way-in day with them as soon as you can after you've sold them. So it shouldn't be a very long time period, but nonetheless you still want to send that out to them. So here's what we're going to do. There's two different ways you can do it. Number one, you can send the text messages right from your phone manually, or number two, you can import it into your Scipio and add them to the campaign. So I will show you both. The first one we'll go over is just the Textedom. So you'll be able to click below this video and download this document that we're looking at right now, and it will give you both versions. But let's take a look at the manual texting version. So this is just the messages and when you want to send them out. So after you sign them up, you'll probably tell them during the nutrition, I'm sorry, during the orientation when you sold them that you're going to be reaching out to them, right? This is you following up with that. So the first message you want to send, text message, and you'll have their phone number already because it's on your lead sheet when they opted into your funnel and when they booked an appointment. So within the first hour after they sign up, you'll say, hey, first name, it's my first name, right? You being the coach. So if you are sales manager or someone else sold them, this is the chance for them to finally connect with you, who's going to be fulfilling the actual services. And then it says, just wanted to say congrats on entering the challenge I'm looking, or I'm going to send you some cool resources before you get started and get you pumped about the challenge, right? So feel free to contact me using this number if you need anything. So now you're giving them your number to contact on. And then immediately after, so as soon as you send that text, send them another text and say, oh, and click this link to join our exclusive VIP Facebook group for challenges only. So that gives them that community type feel. And then here is the link that you can put the group. So just go to your Facebook group, grab the URL and drop that in there. And you can engage with other people who have taken the challenge and worked with me in the past. So that's kind of setting that one-on-one worked with me type of feel. And it also is nice to connect with others who have conquered our challenge on those days where it's hard to get out of bed. So you're adding a little bit of comedy in there, but saying that there's great accountability in the group. So they should join it for those days that are tough, right? So that is the first couple of messages you send out after you've met with them. Then one day later, you're going to wait a day and say, hey, so it says one day later, hey, do you think you could post a quick one-to-three sentence video or post inside of the group introducing yourself to everyone else? Just let them know what you hope to get out of the program and your biggest reason on why you signed up. Feel free to check out anyone else's too. There are a lot of awesome success stories. So that is the only messages that you'll need to send out to them before nutrition day because it's almost, it should be getting really close to that nutrition day. And if you are meeting with them one-on-one for the sale and one-on-one for nutrition day, you'll probably built some good rapport with them and they're not at like a super high risk of backing out. So these should be sufficient along with them joining the Facebook group. If you see after a few days they haven't joined the Facebook group, maybe you want to reach out to them again. But if they join the Facebook group, they're good to go. You shouldn't have any issues with them backing out. And then I put a note at the bottom that says after these couple messages, they will have their way-in day and switch over to Voxer. So once they have their way-in day, that's when you'll have them download the Voxer app and you shouldn't be like going back and forth between your cell phone or your Scipio account. You should be moving all that communication cadence over to Voxer. So the Scipio campaign is exactly the same thing. Only you don't have to send out these three messages. You just put them into the campaign and it will automatically send them out. These two immediately and in the last one a day later. So to do that, these are the instructions. You import the campaign. So all you do is highlight this number right here into your Scipio account, which I'll show you how to do in a second. And it will import it into your account. So let's take a look at doing that now. But these are the instructions on how to do it if you're more of a visual type of learner or you'd like to read it. I'm going to show you how to manipulate it to put your Facebook group link in there as well. So let's jump into Scipio. So this is your main Scipio screen here and you would click on campaigns at the top. And make sure you have Scipio installed first. Click on these three buttons and it will say import campaigns. So you click that and you are going to paste in the button that was on the sheet that you downloaded and you are going to click on import. There it is. Oh, it says you cannot import your own campaigns. But for you, it would import it. Okay. So let's take a look at that campaign. It is called Keep Them Hot Hybrid. And basically this is just the message telling you as the owner what the campaign is all about. And you'll want to click on this first arrow where it says welcome. And you'll see that it says 45 minutes after. It's going to say, hey, first name, it's my first name. You don't have to fill any of that out. Just welcome me to the challenge. Then it is going to wait. And here is where you would drop that Facebook link in. So just paste it right in here. And then finally the post your why. So simple three messages, not much to it. And then all you have to do is click on your address book and you'll pick a contact in there and say this person. You highlight them and all you're going to do is add them to the campaign. So you click on campaign and you click on keep them hot hybrid. And now they will be in there. I'm not going to add this person to it, but you would just click that and they would be in there. If you haven't added the person into Skipio yet, all you have to do is add new. And you can add a new contact manually. All that is required is their first name, their last name and their mobile phone number. Once you add them in there manually, you can select the campaign right down here. So you don't have to take an additional step and boom, they got it. So that is super, super simple. That's all you have to do after the sale, but before way in day, in addition to what Alex mentioned earlier, and you are all set to go.
